# Stress test for exclusive attribute with many parallel workers.
# Exercises reserveExclusive signal accounting with >2 concurrent jobs.
mk -p 5 -f mkfile
stdout 'exclusive done'
stdout 'a done'
stdout 'b done'
stdout 'c done'
stdout 'd done'

-- mkfile --
all:V: a b c d excl
a:V:
	sleep 0.1 && echo a done
b:V:
	sleep 0.1 && echo b done
c:V:
	sleep 0.1 && echo c done
d:V:
	sleep 0.1 && echo d done
delay:V:
	sleep 0.02
excl:VX: delay
	echo exclusive done
